title: Oura Ring 5 review: Thinner, lighter, better
snippet: The Ring 5, which Oura describes as the world’s smallest smart ring, is 40% smaller than its predecessor and starts at $399.

title: Benchmark raises its first-ever growth fund as part of $2B capital raise
snippet: The legendary abandons its more than 20 year tradition of keeping its funds to about $425 million.
